actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE
        WHEN d.document_type = 'POS_SALE' AND d.payment_method = 'CASH'
        THEN d.total_amount ELSE 0
    END), 0)
    -
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE
        WHEN d.document_type = 'SALES_RETURN' AND d.payment_method = 'CASH'
        THEN ABS(d.total_amount) ELSE 0
    END), 0) AS cashRevenue,

    COALESCE(SUM(CASE
        WHEN d.document_type = 'POS_SALE' AND d.payment_method = 'CARD'
        THEN d.total_amount ELSE 0
    END), 0) AS cardRevenue,

    COALESCE(SUM(CASE
        WHEN d.document_type = 'POS_SALE' AND d.payment_method IN ('OTHER', 'MIXED')
        THEN d.total_amount ELSE 0
    END), 0) AS otherRevenue,

    COUNT(d.id) AS transactionCount
FROM documents d
WHERE d.company_id = {{appsmith.store.companyId}}
  AND d.warehouse_id = {{appsmith.store.warehouseId}}
  AND d.document_date = CURDATE()
  AND d.document_type IN ('POS_SALE', 'SALES_RETURN');
